title: AGNI Hub Configuration
description: Per-hub configuration for ports, directories, and hub identity. All properties are optional; defaults are resolved by env-config.js at runtime.

thetaPort.description: TCP port for the theta (adaptive engine) server.

servePort.description: TCP port for the static file / lesson-serve server.

sentryPort.description: TCP port for the sentry (monitoring) server.

dataDir.description: Absolute path to the data directory (JSON stores, telemetry, etc.).

serveDir.description: Absolute path to the compiled lesson-serve output directory.

yamlDir.description: Absolute path to the source YAML lesson directory.

factoryDir.description: Absolute path to the SVG factory output directory.

katexDir.description: Absolute path to the KaTeX CSS/font asset directory.

hubId.description: Human-readable identifier for this hub instance (e.g. 'village-pi-01').
